title: Memorandum Order No. 190, s. 1994
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

MEMORANDUM ORDER NO. 190

AMENDING SEC. 7 OF MEMORANDUM ORDER NO. 179 DATED 7 NOVEMBER 1993

SEC. 7 of MEMORANDUM ORDER NO. 179, series of 1993, creating a special committee for the conversion of non-immigrant visas (indefinite) under Section 47, paragraph (A), sub-paragraph (2) of the Immigration Act, is hereby amended so as to extend the filing of application under the Order from January 15, 1994 to June 30, 1994.

DONE in the City of Manila, this 13 th day of January in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and ninety-four.

(Sgd.) FIDEL V. RAMOS

By the President: (Sgd.) TEOFISTO T. GUINGONA, JR Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
